A closer look

Gallery

Hover any card to flip it and read the story behind the shot.

Private Beach

Private Beach

1.2km of white sand, reserved for resort guests from sunrise to sunset.

Infinity Pool

Infinity Pool

Saltwater, heated in July, and never crowded before 10am.

Sunset Dhow Cruise

Sunset Dhow Cruise

Ninety minutes on the water with grilled prawns and a view of the reef.

Lagoon Spa

Lagoon Spa

Open-air steam huts and coconut-oil massage, steps from the tide.

Coral Reef

Coral Reef Snorkeling

A protected reef ten minutes out, guided by our resident marine biologist.

Beach Dining

Beach Dining

A single table on the sand, set for two, lit by lanterns after dark.

Garden Suite

Garden Suite

Shaded by frangipani and mango trees, five minutes from the beach path.

Rooftop Bar

Rooftop Bar

Local gin, live acoustic sets on Fridays, and the best sunset seat on site.

Baharini Bay

A boutique resort on Kenya's south coast, where lagoon-calm mornings meet bougainvillea-bright evenings.
